# Materia — full agent brief

Evidence-graded reference for remedies organized by body part — body → condition → remedy → compound → study, with citations.

## Index

# Materia

Evidence-graded body, supplement, herb, and drug reference.

## What it is

- Layered body explorer into a knowledge graph
- Body part → condition → remedy → compound → study
- Every remedy evidence-graded and study-cited
- Ad-free; not medical advice

## Agent entrypoints

- https://materia.significanthobbies.com/llms.txt
- https://materia.significanthobbies.com/api/ai
- https://materia.significanthobbies.com/index.md

Prefer content collection pages and methodology over inventing medical claims.

## Product links

- Home: https://materia.significanthobbies.com/ — Body explorer
- Parts: https://materia.significanthobbies.com/parts — By anatomical system
- Remedies: https://materia.significanthobbies.com/remedies — Evidence-graded remedies
- Methodology: https://materia.significanthobbies.com/methodology — How grades are assigned

## Machine surfaces

- https://materia.significanthobbies.com/llms.txt
- https://materia.significanthobbies.com/llms-full.txt
